message:
feat(installer): refine logo layout with side-by-side blocks and blue palette

Rearrange the ASCII art logo so "PI AGENT" and "RUST" blocks display
side-by-side with the owl mascot rather than stacked vertically, creating
a more compact header. Add leading/trailing blank lines and left-padding
for consistent terminal alignment.

Update the color palette from (45,51,39,33,69,75) to (51,45,39,33,81,75)
and switch header text colors from green/grey tones to a cohesive blue
gradient (cyan→light blue) that matches the logo palette:
- Title: foreground 51 (cyan)
- Version: foreground 45 (blue)
- Attribution: foreground 117, 123 (light blue)
- Description: foreground 81, 75, 111 (medium blue)

Both gum-styled and plain ANSI fallback paths updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

       --padding "1 3" \
       --margin "1 0" \
       "$styled_logo" \
